---
title: "Emily Hester Brodrick"
---

## Emily Hester Brodrick

**Dates:** (1846/7-1906)

**Maiden name:** (Melvill)

### Description

novelist, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1887,1888)

### Biography

She was wife of the Rev. and Hon. Alan Brodrick, Vicar of Bramshaw.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
